title: stenocalyx michelii
intro: Stenocalyx michelii, a species of plant in the family Meliaceae, is a tropical tree native to Central and South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Stenocalyx michelii include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
